title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
